Bounce & Collect

Drop balls strategically into a physics-based arena filled with pegs, multipliers, and obstacles. Your goal is to maximize your score by positioning each ball drop to hit high-value multiplier gates (x2, x5, +10 balls) before landing in collection bins. Complete each level by reaching the target score with limited ball drops. Progress through increasingly complex levels with moving obstacles and unlock new ball skins. Bounce & Collect

Drop balls strategically into a physics-based arena filled with pegs, multipliers, and obstacles. Your goal is to maximize your score by positioning each ball drop to hit high-value multiplier gates (x2, x5, +10 balls) before landing in collection bins. Complete each level by reaching the target score with limited ball drops. Progress through increasingly complex levels with moving obstacles and unlock new ball skins.

Controls: LEFT ARROW: Move drop position left | RIGHT ARROW: Move drop position right | SPACE: Drop a ball | ENTER: Start game | ESC: Pause/Unpause | R: Restart

TEST_1.test_description: Testing basic ball drop mechanics and physics simulation. Verifies that balls drop when SPACE is pressed, interact properly with pegs and walls using Matter.js physics, and eventually land in collection bins at the bottom. Also tests that the drop position can be controlled with arrow keys.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Drop 3 balls at different horizontal positions (left, center, right) by moving the drop position with arrow keys and pressing SPACE. Wait for each ball to complete its journey through the arena and land in a bin. Observe physics interactions with pegs and boundaries.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: All balls should drop smoothly, bounce realistically off pegs and walls, and eventually settle in bottom bins. The drop position indicator should move left/right with arrow keys. No balls should escape the arena or phase through obstacles. Physics should look natural and responsive.

With many balls on screen (10+), physics should remain stable and responsive at 60 FPS. No matter.js errors or visual artifacts should occur even with high ball counts.

test_7_ModeBtn.test_description: Testing edge cases and boundary conditions. Verifies that balls cannot move drop position out of bounds, that extreme drop positions near walls work correctly, and that the arena boundaries are solid. Tests performance with maximum balls on screen simultaneously.
